added.name: trip_receipt_itemized
added.description: Display a detailed financial breakdown of a completed trip fare, including taxes, fees, and payment method used.

added.name: uber_one_benefits_list
added.description: Display a comprehensive list of all membership benefits categorized by service type like Eats, Rides, and Grocery.

added.name: uber_one_checkout
added.description: Review and confirm a subscription membership plan and payment method to start a free trial or paid membership.

added.name: uber_one_membership_detail
added.description: Explain the benefits of the Uber One membership and provide an entry point for users to subscribe or start a trial.

added.name: uber_one_signup_success
added.description: Confirm that the user has successfully started their Uber One membership and highlight the active benefits.

added.name: package_delivery_checkout_review
added.description: Review package details, pickup/drop-off locations, and estimated cost before confirming the delivery request.

added.name: package_pickup_details_form
added.description: Capture the pickup address, sender contact information, and specific driver instructions for a package delivery request.

added.name: airline_selection_list
added.description: Allows users to select their airline to help drivers identify the correct terminal for airport drop-offs or pickups.

added.name: ride_receipt_rating
added.description: To provide a trip summary including cost and distance, and to allow the user to rate and tip the driver after arrival.

changed.name: ride_service_selection
reasons: no longer navigates to removed screen `ride_matching_status`
